scope: OO and COE candidate source leads only. This inventory contains no prayer text and creates no tradition-specific prayer entries. It supports later internal corpus construction from real source text; public rendering is reviewed separately.

candidateSourceLeads.sourceTitle: The Agpeya / Prayers of the Hours
candidateSourceLeads.notes: Strong Coptic Orthodox source lead. The inventory imports no prayer text; selected prayers can be built later from real source text under the internal corpus model.
neededBeforeCorpusEntry: identify exact prayer unit locators
select edition or translation witness
attach compact sourceId before any OO prayer entry is added

candidateSourceLeads.sourceTitle: The Holy Euchologion, contemporary English witness
candidateSourceLeads.notes: Potential Coptic pastoral-need source lead. Use it to identify received material without turning the inventory into a permissions database.
neededBeforeCorpusEntry: verify ecclesial/source edition
identify exact prayer unit locators
separate sacramental office material from lay Book of Needs devotional material

candidateSourceLeads.sourceFamily: Syriac Orthodox / Malankara Orthodox West Syriac

neededBeforeCorpusEntry: identify exact office or prayer unit locators
select edition or translation witness
confirm whether a candidate prayer belongs in Book of Needs rather than office corpus

candidateSourceLeads.sourceFamily: Church of the East / external Anglican missionary witness
